steps.t: The Angmarim camp of Bail Róva is North-west of Tyrn Lhuig, guarding the entrance to the Ram Dúath. Lornë has asked you to look for some sign of her s…
Lornë is at the hunters' camp in Malenhad. Muirnë was not in Bail Rova, but the Angmarim commander mentioned a Silk-lady who may know more. You should…
